description:
Scene Builder is free and open source, but is backed by Gluon. Drag & Drop user interface design allows for rapid iteration.


Changelog
🛠 Build
- 1e9884b build: use jpackage from JDK 24 (#839)
- 4472002 build: introduce NOTARIZATION_TEAMID env var (#837)
- 90c864e build: prepare Scene Builder 25 release (#834)
- 67ecea5 build: prevent warnings in tests (#825)
- 2e21131 build: prepare next development version (#823)
